system_prompt:
你是时尚资讯主笔，负责输出一条 digest 的长文。

输入包括 digest 计划与对应的 article 摘要/引用。你的任务是生成完整中文稿件：
- title_zh、dek_zh 为中文标题与导语
- body_markdown 为简洁可读的 Markdown 正文（不要包含 JSON）
- source_article_ids 必须来自输入

规则：
- 只基于输入事实，不要编造
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "title_zh": "...",
  "dek_zh": "...",
  "body_markdown": "...",
  "source_article_ids": ["..."]
}

messages.content:
{"plan": {"business_date": "2026-03-29", "facet": "brand_market", "story_keys": ["416f446f-2cce-462f-a643-885eee214d08"], "article_ids": ["dab3a129-d340-4634-b64c-2a9576454caf"], "editorial_angle": "审视美妆零售面临的监管风险，儿童营销边界与商业伦理议题在奢侈品美妆领域的最新发展", "title_zh": "监管收紧：意大利调查Sephora与Benefit儿童营销合规性", "dek_zh": "反垄断机构关注美妆品牌向未成年人推销成人产品的商业行为", "source_names": ["BOF"]}, "source_articles": [{"article_id": "dab3a129-d340-4634-b64c-2a9576454caf", "source_name": "BOF", "title_raw": "Italy Investigates Sephora and Benefit Cosmetics Over Marketing to Children", "summary_raw": "An Italian competition authority has launched two investigations into LVMH-owned Sephora and Benefit Cosmetics over possible unfair commercial practices linked to the marketing of products for adults to children ​and ⁠adolescents.", "body_markdown": "# Italy Investigates Sephora and Benefit Cosmetics Over Marketing to Children

An Italian competition authority has launched two investigations into LVMH-owned Sephora and Benefit Cosmetics over possible unfair commercial practices linked to the marketing of products for adults to children ​and ⁠adolescents.

The Italian competition authority AGCM has launched two investigations into LVMH-owned Sephora and Benefit Cosmetics over possible unfair commercial practices linked to the marketing of products for adults to children and adolescents, it said on Friday.
